title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic and OpenAI have publicly warned about accelerating AI self-improvement capabilities, with Claude now handling code writing, review, and experiments that contribute to faster AI development. The concern centers on AI systems beginning to autonomously contribute to their own improvement cycle, a shift that may outpace governance frameworks.
